eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Lincoln, NM; at 02:22 PM ON MAY 16, 2026 Effective until 08:22 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: due to advancing wildfire, residents are urged to evacuate their homes. if you need assistance, please call 5756482341
